arts.ttl: Inter’s Yann Bisseck gains trust as European clubs take notice
arts.sum: Inter Milan’s young German defender Yann Bisseck is rapidly earning the trust of coach Simone Inzaghi while attracting the attention of top European clubs. Calciomercato report how despite a challenging start to his season, marked by costly mistakes, Bisseck has shown significant improvement, convincing Inzaghi to rely on him in crucial matches. Ahead of Inter’s Serie A clash against Lazio, speculation arose regarding whether Bisseck or the experienced Matteo Darmian would start in defense. Lazio’s dangerous duo of Tavares and Zaccagni posed a significant challenge, leading many to believe that Inzaghi would opt for Darmian’s discipline and experience. arts.ttl: Lazio vs. Inter, finishing with a bang
arts.sum: Lazio are the team that have won the most matches by just one goal difference in this Serie A campaign (6), while only Mallorca (7) have hadmore such victories across the big five European leagues. Inter have scored at least one goal in each of their last eight Serie A away games against Lazio (W4 D1 L3); the last time they scored in more consecutive away games against the Biancocelesti in the Italian top-flight dates back to 1960 (12 on that occasion).
